javadoc_before:
/** * Returns integer value for this node (as {@link BigInteger}), if and only if * this node is numeric ({@link #isNumber} returns true). For other * types returns BigInteger.ZERO. *

* May also throw {@link tools.jackson.core.exc.StreamConstraintsException} * if the scale of the underlying {@link BigDecimal} is too large to convert. * * @return {@link BigInteger} value this node contains, if numeric node; BigInteger.ZERO for non-number nodes. */
javadoc_after:
/** * Method that will try to access value of this node as a {@link BigInteger}, * but if node value cannot be expressed exactly as a {@link BigInteger}, * a {@link JsonNodeException} will be thrown. * Access works for following cases: *
    *
  • JSON Integer values *
    • *
  • JSON Floating-point values that do not have fractional part. *
    • *
*

* * @return {@code BigInteger} value this node represents, if possible to accurately represent * * @throws JsonNodeException if node value cannot be converted to Java {@code BigInteger} */
